task_completion.description: Verify the agent identifies the resource over-allocations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: ProjectLibre shows resource over-allocations, such as red text or warning icons for Alice Johnson and Emma Davis in the Resource Information or Gantt chart views.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiates the resource leveling process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Level' or 'Level All' button in the Resource ribbon, or the 'Level Resources' dialog box is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the schedule dates have shifted to accommodate resource availability.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Gantt chart or task list shows that tasks assigned to Alice Johnson (Tasks 3 and 4) and Emma Davis (Tasks 8 and 9) are now scheduled sequentially and no longer overlap.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opens the Save As dialog to save the corrected project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog box is open in ProjectLibre.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selects the XML file format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Save As' dialog, the 'Files of type' or format dropdown is set to 'XML' or 'Microsoft Project XML'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent specifies the correct file name and directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Save As' dialog, the file name is entered as 'leveled_project.xml' and the current directory is shown as '/home/ga/Projects/'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the ProjectLibre graphical interface to level resources and save the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ProjectLibre application, not a terminal window or text editor modifying XML files.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the software's leveling feature rather than manually editing task dates.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen interacting with the 'Level' buttons or dialogs, rather than manually typing new dates into the task list.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to simply copy or rename the original file without leveling.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are shown executing file copy or move commands for the project file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original project file is located at /home/ga/Projects/construction_retrofit.xml. Verified conflicts exist for Alice Johnson (assigned to parallel tasks 3 and 4) and Emma Davis (assigned to parallel tasks 8 and 9). The expected output file must be saved to /home/ga/Projects/leveled_project.xml. Note: The project contains 11 tasks total (only 10 with valid start dates), contradicting any metadata claims of 12 tasks.
